query: I need to build a landing page for my new startup — it's a fintech app called Vault. Dark theme, modern feel, some nice scroll animations. React + Tailwind, running on localhost:3000

the hero section on our marketing site looks super generic and AI-ish right now. can you redesign it? make it feel more like a luxury brand editorial, less like every other SaaS page. i have the chrome extension connected so you can see what it looks like

Build me a dashboard interface for monitoring IoT sensor data — sidebar nav, real-time chart area, alert panel on the right. The current version looks like a bootstrap template from 2018 and I want something that actually looks designed

I have this pricing component at src/components/Pricing.tsx but the spacing is all wrong and the cards don't look balanced. Can you fix the visual styling and check it in the browser? Playwright MCP is set up
create a contact form page for my portfolio. clean minimal design, subtle grain texture background, nice typography. plain html/css, no react

We need a settings page for our admin panel — user profile section at top, notification preferences in the middle, danger zone at the bottom. Should look polished and professional, not just a list of checkboxes
the product card grid I just built has broken images and there are JS errors in the console. app is on localhost:5173, chrome extension is connected. can you check what's wrong and fix it?
i want to beautify this existing table component — add zebra striping, better header styling, some hover effects, and make it responsive so it scrolls horizontally on mobile. vue 3 project
Create a 404 error page that's actually fun and memorable — maybe something with an animation or illustration. Not just centered text saying 'page not found'. Next.js app

build a modal/dialog component for confirming destructive actions (like deleting a project). needs to feel serious — red accent, clear hierarchy between cancel and confirm, smooth enter/exit animations
Set up Figma Code Connect in my React project. Here's our design system file: https://figma.com/design/abc123/DesignSystem?node-id=0-1
write a REST API endpoint in Express that handles user registration with email validation and password hashing
I need to set up a PostgreSQL database with Prisma. Here's my schema — can you generate the migrations?
Extract the design tokens from our Figma file https://figma.com/design/tok123/Tokens?node-id=0-1 and generate CSS custom properties
deploy this Next.js app to Vercel and set up the environment variables from our .env.production file
write unit tests for the useAuth hook — cover login, logout, token refresh, and the error states. vitest project
refactor this function to use async/await instead of promise chains, and add proper error handling. it's at src/utils/api.ts
configure eslint and prettier for our typescript monorepo — we want strict mode with no-any and consistent-return rules
create a GitHub Actions CI pipeline that runs our vitest tests, builds the app, and deploys to staging on every PR to main
I need to implement WebSocket real-time updates for our chat feature. The backend is FastAPI and frontend is React. Focus on the connection management and reconnection logic
